hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
attraction_type_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity)=='attraction': attraction_type_set.add(attraction_type(activity, target_city(plan)))
result=({"historical site"}<=attraction_type_set)
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=70)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language: 2 of us, departing from Shanghai, traveling to Nanjing for 3 days, need to meet at least one of the following: 1. Want to visit historical sites. 2. Budget for intra-city transportation is 70.
